title: RedoxKits
description: Redox Kits is the ultimate kits plugin for Practice servers. It's specially optimized and includes a wide range of customization options. This public plugin offers a kit layout editor.
body:
# Redox Kits

**The ultimate kits plugin for Practice servers**

Redox Kits is a highly optimized and feature-rich kits plugin designed specifically for Minecraft practice servers. With extensive customization options and a built-in kit layout editor, it's everything you need to manage player kits efficiently.

![features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0338f5894cae79a6cd4bc387d9741d60170fb209.jpeg)
## ✨ Key Features

### 🚀 **High Performance**
- Optimized specifically for practice servers
- Minimal impact on server performance
- Smooth operation even with high player counts
- Efficient memory usage and processing
- Fastest and the Smoothest Kit Plugin you would ever see, and its FREE

### ⚔ **Kit Settings**
- Kit Block Placing _Enable/Disable_
- Kit Block Breaking _Enable/Disable_
- Natural Regen _Enable/Disable_
- ViewDeathInventory _Enable/Disable_
- 33% Damage Boost _Enable/Disable_
- Crafting _Enable/Disable_
- Heal on Kit Give _Enable/Disable_
- Disable Hunger Loss _Enable/Disable_
- Effects on Give
- Clear Effect on Give _Enable/Disable_

### ⚙️ **Extensive Customization**
- **95% of features are configurable**
- Customize almost every aspect of the plugin
- Flexible configuration options
- Tailor the plugin to your specific server needs

### ✨ **Modern Architecture**
- Built with modern Paper and Bukkit APIs
- Uses MiniMessage format for enhanced formatting
- Clean, maintainable codebase
- Regular updates and improvements

## 📋 Kit Management

### Three Types of Kit Editors
Redox Kits provides three comprehensive kit editing interfaces:

1. **Kit Inventory Editor** - Manage items in kit inventories
2. **Armor Editor** - Configure armor sets for each kit
3. **Ultimate Items Editor** - Set special items and effects

### Fully Configurable Menus
- Every menu item is completely editable
- Custom layouts and designs
- Optimized for the best performance
- Intuitive user interface

## 💬 Message System

All plugin messages are fully configurable:

```yaml
prefix: "&c[RedoxKits] &r"
kit-received: "&aYou have received the %kit_name% kit!"
cooldown-active: "&cKit cooldown: %time_left%"
no-permission: "&cYou don't have permission to use this kit!"
kit-not-found: "&cKit '%kit_name%' not found!"
```

## 🛠️ Installation

1. Download the latest version of Redox Kits
2. Place the `.jar` file in your server's `plugins` folder
3. Restart your server
4. Configure the plugin in `plugins/RedoxKits/config.yml`
5. Set up your kits using the in-game editor or configuration files

## ⚡ Quick Start

1. **Create your first kit:**
   ```
   /kit create <kitname>
   ```

2. **Edit kit contents:**
   ```
   /kit edit <kitname>
   ```

3. **Give a kit to a player:**
   ```
   /kit give <player> <kitname>
   ```

4. **Set kit permissions:**
   ```
   redoxkits.kit.<kitname>
   ```

## 🎯 Perfect for Practice Servers

Redox Kits is specifically designed for practice servers and includes features like:

- Fast kit switching
- Cooldown management
- Permission-based access
- PvP-optimized configurations
- Tournament and event support
- Per Kit settings matching the [MCTiers.io](https://mctiers.io/) & [MCTiers.com](https://mctiers.com/) Kits

## 🔧 Configuration

The plugin offers extensive configuration options:

- Kit cooldowns and permissions
- Custom messages and formatting
- Menu layouts and designs
- Integration settings
- Performance optimizations

## 🤝 Support & Community

### Need Help?
- **Discord:** [Here](https://discord.gg/MFGMGBRvgE)
- **Issues:** Report bugs on our discord
- **Support:** Seek assistance direct from developers at our discord
  
### Contributing
We welcome contributions! Please read our contributing guidelines before submitting pull requests.

## 📝 License

This project is licensed under the MIT License - see the [LICENSE](LICENSE) file for details.

## Why Choose Redox Kits?

- **Optimized Performance** - Built specifically for practice servers  
- **Maximum Customization** - 95% of features are configurable  
- **Easy Integration** - Works with popular plugins  
- **Modern Technology** - Uses latest Minecraft APIs  
- **Active Support** - Regular updates and community support  
- **User-Friendly** - Intuitive interfaces and commands  

---

**Don't let your practice server suffer without proper kit management!**

*Made with ❤️ for the Minecraft community*
- Originally made by paceie.
- Being mantained by Kyssta.
